items.docs:
Starts a transcription request for a single audio or video file.

We support a wide array of audio formats along with their respective compression / codec
options including:
 - AAC
 - FLAC
 - MP1
 - MP3
 - WAV

Currently we only support MP4 video files where the audio streams _must_ be one
of the supported audio formats.

Files must be less than or equal to 1 gigabyte in size, and the upload must
take less than 30 minutes.

Multichannel audio will be merged into a single stream prior to transcri

params.name: transcription_id
params.description: ID of a transcription to retrieve

items.docs: Get the resulting transcript from the transcription request.
